description: The cave walls are lined with shimmering minerals that hum with a low frequency. You can hear faint, ghostly whispers echoing through the tunnels.

wall.description: Solid stone walls embedded with pulsating crystals.

glowing_floor.description: The floor of the cave glows with a soft, bioluminescent light.

exit_west.description: The cave entrance leads back to the forest.

whispering_wall.description: A wall covered in strange, mouth-like fissures that emit soft whispers.

item.name: Echoes
item.description: The wall whispers: 'The battery demands potential energy... but potential is only found when one is still...'

glowcap_mushrooms.description: A patch of bright purple mushrooms. They smell like ozone.

lace_vine.description: A single, incredibly strong shoelace vine hangs from the ceiling.

item.onCollect: Your scream vibrates the vine, causing it to snap and fall into your hands!

item_magnifying_glass.description: A shiny object is partially buried in the glowing dust. It looks like a lens of some sort.
